import pytest
from source import find_in_sorted

def test_quixbugs_find_in_sorted():
    # Test case where target is the last element
    arr = [3, 4, 5, 6, 7]
    x = 7
    expected_result = 4  # Index of the last element in the sorted array
    result = find_in_sorted(arr, x)
    assert result == expected_result, f"Expected find_in_sorted({arr}, {x}) to return {expected_result}, but got {result}"
